name: DSWorld: A Data Science World Model for Efficient Autonomous Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.15901v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite strong capabilities in data understanding and decision-making, autonomous data science agents still heavily rely on trial-and-error workflows...
description: arXiv:2607.15901v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite strong capabilities in data understanding and decision-making, autonomous data science agents still heavily rely on trial-and-error workflows that involve expensive computation. This bottleneck motivates models that can anticipate the effects of data science operations before real execution. In this paper, we introduce the concept of Data...
author: Zherui Yang, Fan Liu, Hao Liu
